title: Action-Adventure Games Are the Most Popular in 2026, GAMIVO Research Shows
summary: GAMIVO, a popular platform with discounted video games, published its latest research. It shows that gamers in 2026 most frequently choose action-adventure games. RPGs came second, and survival games took third place.
